Location of Ekeros
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2016 at 10:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1681690707290
1 post
The cell door to get to Ekeros is at -112,-62,-23. Jumped through bars with Monk per previous post, no key required. Had to use origin to get out of the room.
▲ Page top
*$#()*$# Locked Cell
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2006 at 6:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591876968752
6 posts
There are two locked cells .. one with a hole .. easy to get out of, the 2nd one I cannot get out of. If I have a Rogue or someone who can pick locks with me will that help? Or is there an easy way to get there? HELP .. the only thing I need is this Sapphire.
▲ Page top
Ekeros
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2005 at 11:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593364805781
7 posts
I did this last nite and found that My human Monk could stand between the bars and jump through them with no key, I hope this helps ya
▲ Page top
waiting on the spawn
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2003 at 9:37 AM Rating: Decent
dmperlman
Scholar
84 posts
did this the other night with level 32 monk - virtually everything in the dungeon was "green", a few light blues & blues. took along a high level cleric who basically kept me healed when needed (and, if everything in room was green just wiped the mat with them to save time). we cleared both rooms out four times before ekeros spawned - he spawned immediately after rathyl spawned, who came out of his cell completely into jail area and attacked - he was blue to me, took him out (he respawns immediately as rathyl reincarnate, a big skellie who was also blue); ekeros just stood around and watched the fight, then took him out - he was green. got the drop. rathyl, on the other hand, didn't drop diddly... anyway, enough rambling, i have my red sash!
____________________________
Original main, from "back in the day", Wuji, 65 Halfling Druid, Nameless Server (relegated to the dustbin of history)
Current main, Kyfho, 125 Froglok Monk, Tunare Server (with a Froglok Pally persona)
▲ Page top
key
QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2003 at 10:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780624905
9 posts
I went to the ogre captain and got a shiny metal key and when I go to where Ekeros spawns it says that I dont have the key... I also have a guards keyring.. anyone know what key it actually is??
▲ Page top
RE: key
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2003 at 4:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760547958
36 posts
You have the right key, but do you have it in your cursor or in your inventory. It matters. I forgot to get it out of my inventory. I'm blonde at times, comes with being a wiz. We need that (C)rack </drool>.
▲ Page top
Identifies as Sapphire of Souls
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2003 at 5:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758423492
View User Forum
Sage
308 posts
So Sapphire of Souls is just the alternative name for Blackened Sapphire.
▲ Page top
WalkThrough
QuoteReply
# May 11 2002 at 7:00 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592759201239
Scholar
21 posts
Enter in Najena and stay on the left side of the wall and follow it till you enter a torture room. Walk through the wall and there will be a path on your right till you see two doors. Choose the door on your right, head straight till you see a path on your right. Stick to the left side of the wall and you will see the Orge Captain(#9 on EQ AtlasMap), kill it and retrieve the key. Head back out and and go to #6 on EQ AtlasMap and drop into the trap and fall into a jail room. The wall of the jail has an opening, duck and crawl out. Move on to #11 on EQ AtlasMap and use the key to open the bars with the magicians inside. Kill all the magicians in that room.(so called waiting room for Rathye) Ekeros has a placeholder, which is the magician in the right hand side corner. Ekeros is a rare spawn, so be patient. Spawn time is about 20 minutes. Good luck.

1). "A Blackened Sapphire" is dropped on Ekeros in Najena. Location is #11 on Najena EQ AtlasMap.
2). You will need to get one key, which is Shiny Metal Key dropped on Ogre Captain at location #9 on EQ AtlasMap. (Optional: You can also pick up a key from Orge Guard before you head down.(Name of key is called guard's keyring. Main use for that key is when you drop into the traps you can open the jail doors.)
3). Item is also know as Sapphire of Souls.

Edited, Sat May 11 19:52:40 2002
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 02 2002 at 5:41 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) SNOOCHIE BOOCHIES!!!
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 01 2001 at 7:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I need one of those for Monk Red Sash Quest,it requires the orange sash (previous sash aquired) a "sapphire of Souls"aka The Blackened Sapphire and Marneks wand aka Blackened wand.BTW the thing won't let me log in so tihs is Munkmastre just so you all know,say hi if i'm on =) sorry,had to say hi to everyone
Specifics
QuoteReply
# May 24 2001 at 8:52 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592247845609
Scholar
73 posts
Ekeros spawns in the waiting room outside of Rathyl's room, in Najena. It's in the jail area, off to the side, and requires a key to open. The middle magician is his ph. Ekeros seems to be relatively uncommon, too, though he has always dropped a sapphire for me (8 times) and he holds it in his hand. It looks like your average EQ ice cream cone when held. I kept a pair for my shd. ^^

And as to the mana regeneration thing... ermn... where did that idea come from? =P
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 15 2001 at 12:00 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) mana regen is not really important to a rouge or someone but it is not worth 80pp cause i tried a great deal of people and still no one wanted to buy it for 80pp and the highest offer was 50pp.
no mana regen, but . . .
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2001 at 12:53 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I believe it is for the red sash quest for monks. That gives it some sale value.
